content.content:
I found a matching event but need two quick confirmations before I reschedule it.

Found event:
- Title: "Dentist Appointment"
- Description: "Regular dental check-up."
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Event ID: 5
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com

Questions:
1) Is this the "Dental check-up" event you meant? (Title differs but description matches.)
2) I couldn't find an email address for the clinic in your contacts. Please provide the clinic's email address so I can add them to the event and notify both you and the clinic. If you prefer, I can proceed now and only notify you (your address is emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com).

If you confirm the event and provide the clinic email (or tell me to notify only you), I'll:
- Add the clinic as a participant (if you supply the email),
- Reschedule the event to start 2024-05-20 10:00 and keep the original 1-hour duration (new end 11:00),
- Notify both you and the clinic by email about the new time.
